description:
This quiz tests intermediate to advanced JavaScript developers on their understanding of ECMAScript standards from ES2015 to ES2022, with a playful yet technical tone. It assesses familiarity with modern JS features, syntax, and updates through multiple-choice questions, emphasizing practical application and precision.
Topics: ES2015 (ES6), ES2016, ES2017, ES2018, ES2019, ES2020, ES2021, ES2022
Audience: JavaScript developers seeking to validate or enhance their knowledge of evolving ECMAScript standards and syntax.
